metrics.finalAnswer:
**Exact gate (lines 871–875):**

```
messages.slice(-3).some(m =>
  (m.content as ContentBlock[]).some(b =>
    b.type === 'tool_use' || b.type === 'tool_result'
  )
)
```

It looks at the **last 3 messages** of the conversation and checks whether any of them contain a `tool_use` or `tool_result` content block. If yes, `turnHadToolWork = true` and postflight runs. Pure text turns (no tool activity in the trailing 3 messages) skip it entirely.
